channel.title: Photographies on Hollis Akins
channel.description: Recent content in Photographies on Hollis Akins

item.description: These photographs were captured using various telescopes at two different observatories: the Guilford College Cline Observatory in Greensboro, NC and the West Optical Observatory at the Pisgah Astronomical Research Institute (PARI) in Western NC. I began learning to use telescopes and observational equipment in the spring of 2018, through an astronomy course at Guilford College. This sparked an interest in both astrophysics research and astrophotography, which led to several further projects, including an artistic exploraiton and planetary photography and a scientific research project on variable stars.
